behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names skills/inference-server/SKILL.md, skills/toml-config/SKILL.md, .claude/skills symlink, AGENTS.md updates, required frontmatter fields (name, description), @ syntax, --/--no- CLI overrides, and custom endpoints - all test assertions trace back to these.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to document but doesn't provide exact text/code; agent must reason about content and structure.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for substantive content (>100 chars), presence of 'uv run inference', '@', '--', and at least one custom endpoint - flexible enough for multiple correct solutions.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All fail-to-pass tests are text/file-existence checks (Path.exists, 'in body' substring checks, yaml.safe_load); no code execution or behavioral testing of the skills system itself.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test requires creating the actual files with specific content strings like 'uv run inference' and specific endpoints; stubs would not pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover skills directory, both SKILL.md files, frontmatter, symlink, and AGENTS.md Skills section as required by instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized with section comments (pass-to-pass structural, repo_tests, fail-to-pass pr_diff) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: YAML frontmatter schema (name, description fields) is documented in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names are consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies files to create/modify but that's the nature of this docs task - no line-level hints.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: AGENTS.md edit is localized (adds Skills section, modifies one bullet) and doesn't rewrite the whole file.
